    • SIGNER_URI

      public static final String SIGNER_URI
      The base URI of the remote signer endpoint. Optional, defaults to CatalogProperties.URI.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SIGNER_ENDPOINT

      public static final String SIGNER_ENDPOINT
      The endpoint path of the remote signer endpoint. If remote signing has been requested, this must be set.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
